title: Human Approval, Trustworthy Preview, Pause, Expiry, and Resume · Language Clinic: Approval Trigger Policy
summary: The model asks “Are you sure?”, hides exact recipients and amount, edits arguments after approval, treats silence as consent, and cannot safely resume after process restart. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the approval trigger policy increment in cryptographically bound approval checkpoint. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Trigger approval from effect class, value, uncertainty, novelty, policy, affected party, data sensitivity, and user settings before execution.
Cancel siblings when policy requires, collect partial outcomes, close handlers, reconcile uncertain effects, and prove no task survives the turn.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-human-approval-resume-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-human-approval-resume-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_human_approval_resume_3(sensitive_actions: int = 8, approval_requests: int = 8, immutable_previews: int = 8, approved_actions: int = 5, expired_or_rejected: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if sensitive_actions < 1 or approval_requests < 0:
        return False, approval_requests, "approval-count"
    if approval_requests != sensitive_actions or immutable_previews != sensitive_actions:
        return False, immutable_previews, "approval-preview-gap"
    if approved_actions + expired_or_rejected != sensitive_actions:
        return False, approved_actions, "approval-reconciliation"
    if expired_or_rejected < 1:
        return False, expired_or_rejected, "approval-expiry"
    assert approval_requests == sensitive_actions and approved_actions + expired_or_rejected == sensitive_actions
    return True, approved_actions, "bound-human-approval"

# Evidence: agentpy-approval-trigger-policy-1oyavc
# Competency: agentpy-approval-trigger-policy.
# Case 3644: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_approval_trigger_policy_1oyavc(sensitive_actions: int = 8, approval_requests: int = 8, immutable_previews: int = 8, approved_actions: int = 5, expired_or_rejected: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1oyavc = "1oyavc-cvayo1-3644"
    assert evidence_variant_1oyavc
    evidence_axes_1oyavc = (
        "authority1oyavc",
        "interaction3644",
        "toolcvayo1",
        "state1oyavc3644",
        "evaluation36441oyavc",
        "recoverycvayo13644",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1oyavc)) == 6
    if sensitive_actions < 1 or approval_requests < 0:
        return False, approval_requests, "approval-count"
    if approval_requests != sensitive_actions or immutable_previews != sensitive_actions:
        return False, immutable_previews, "approval-preview-gap"
    if approved_actions + expired_or_rejected != sensitive_actions:
        return False, approved_actions, "approval-reconciliation"
    if expired_or_rejected < 1:
        return False, expired_or_rejected, "approval-expiry"
    assert approval_requests == sensitive_actions and approved_actions + expired_or_rejected == sensitive_actions
    return True, approved_actions, "bound-human-approval"
